detail.title: Join Indes Al,Automation,&Integration team and collaborate with a talented group of specialists

AWsShowall
Welcome to Inde, New Zealand’s leading employee-owned IT consultancy.Big enough to work
with the country's largest customers, yet agile enough to make things happen without
bureaucracy. Your effort doesn't enrich distant investors - it rewards you.
Technically led and outcome focused, our technical experts - that's you - lead the way for our
customers, while the rest of us help you make it happen. The whole company exists to help you,
help our customers succeed.
Join Indes Al,Automation,&Integration team and collaborate with a talented group of specialists
to design and deliver innovative integration and automation solutions for our enterprise customers.
Reporting to the Al & Data Technical Director, you will have the opportunity to work in a cloud-first
environment, solving real-world business problems with both code and low-code tools. We keep
our processes agile - rather than offering off-the-shelf answers, you'll have the autonomy to craft
customer-focused solutions that address each client's unique needs.
What You'll Do
· Build cutting-edge integration & automation solutions using your expertise and the support of
your team. You'll connect systems and streamline processes to create tangible business
outcomes.
· Implement Al-enabled solutions such as intelligent document processing, Al-assisted search,
chatbots, and workflow augmentation using Azure Al services.
·Consult and collaborate with a diverse range of enterprise customers - from gathering
requirements to designing and implementing the right technical solutions that turn their needs
into reality.
our culture: we invest time and resources in training, certifications, and personal development
every week.
·Work in a supportive, cross-functional team environment where knowledge-sharing, coaching
and collective problem-solving are the norm. You'llboth draw on your team's knowledge and
contribute to upskilling others.
· Enjoy flexibility in how you work. We support hybrid working (mix of home and office) and
occasional customer site visits, so you can deliver your best work in the environment that suits
you.
What You'll Bring
· Integrations bringing together separate systems to solve customer problems
·Knowledge of automation tools to streamline processes and improve efficiency
·Low-code/ No-code integration frameworks
